violations.detail: Transient download failures are common during image builds. A .curlrc file with --retry settings makes builds more robust. The fix inserts a comment, ENV CURL_HOME, and a COPY heredoc with retry defaults.
violations.message: stage uses curl without a retry config; consider adding a .curlrc with retry settings
violations.sourceCode: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl

suggestedFix.description: Add curl retry config via COPY heredoc

edits.newText:
# [tally] curl configuration for improved robustness
ENV CURL_HOME=/etc/curl
COPY --chmod=0644 <<EOF ${CURL_HOME}/.curlrc
--retry-connrefused
--connect-timeout 15
--retry 5
--max-time 300
EOF
